response.global_analysis: The audio features a combination of dialogue and a high-energy song. The dialogue is transcribed and translated based on the characters' speech patterns and emotions. The song, 'DANZEN! Futari wa Precure', is transcribed and translated using the on-screen lyrics and the provided Reference JSON as guides for accuracy. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio, including splitting lines during audible pauses to maintain synchronicity.

subtitles.original: ラミィ、悩んでる顔してどうしたの？
subtitles.english: Lamy, you look worried. What's the matter?

subtitles.original: あ、かなたん！
subtitles.english: Ah, Kanatan!

subtitles.original: そうなの。ヒーローってどうあるべきか分からなくなっちゃって。
subtitles.english: Yeah. I've become unsure about what a hero should be like.

subtitles.original: 力があるだけじゃダメなんだ。
subtitles.english: Just having power isn't enough.

subtitles.original: 大事なのはその力をどう使うか、だよ。
subtitles.english: What's important is how you use that power.

subtitles.original: かなたん……。
subtitles.english: Kanatan...

subtitles.original: 握力だけじゃ世界は変えられない。
subtitles.english: You can't change the world with grip strength alone.

subtitles.original: 人々の心を守るのもヒーローの大事な大事な仕事なんだから。
subtitles.english: Protecting people's hearts is also a very, very important job for a hero.

subtitles.original: そっか。力で守れないものもあるよね。
subtitles.english: I see. There are things you can't protect with strength, right?

subtitles.original: さっ！だからヒーローにも強い心が必要なんだ。
subtitles.english: Right! That's why a hero needs a strong heart too.

subtitles.original: どんなにピンチになっても、乗り越えるたびにどんどん強くなる心が。
subtitles.english: A heart that grows stronger every time you overcome a crisis.

subtitles.original: さあ！僕と一緒に歌って強い心を掴み取ろう！
subtitles.english: Now! Let's sing together and seize that strong heart!

subtitles.original: うん！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: プリキュア プリキュア
subtitles.english: Precure! Precure!

subtitles.original: プリキュア プリキュア
subtitles.english: Precure! Precure!

subtitles.original: プリキュア プリキュア プリキュア プリキュア
subtitles.english: Precure! Precure! Precure! Precure!

subtitles.original: プリティで キュアキュア ふたりは プリキュア
subtitles.english: Prettily, Cure Cure! We are Precure!

subtitles.original: 一難去って、また一難
subtitles.english: One disaster after another...

subtitles.original: ぶっちゃけありえない！
subtitles.english: It's unbelievable, honestly!

subtitles.original: 制服着てても ふたりは
subtitles.english: Even in our school uniforms, the two of us...

subtitles.original: むちゃくちゃタフだし！
subtitles.english: Are incredibly tough!

subtitles.original: お互いピンチを乗り越えるたび
subtitles.english: Every time we overcome a crisis together,

subtitles.original: 強く（強く）近く（近く）なるな☆
subtitles.english: We get stronger and closer!

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: Your best! My best! 生きてるんだから
subtitles.english: Your best! My best! Because we're alive,

subtitles.original: 失敗なんて めじゃない！
subtitles.english: Failure is nothing to us!

subtitles.original: 笑う門には福来るでしょ！
subtitles.english: Fortune comes to those who smile, right?

subtitles.original: ネガティブだって ブッ飛ぶぅ～！
subtitles.english: Even negativity will be blown away!

subtitles.original: 生命の花 咲かせて！思いっきり～
subtitles.english: Let the flower of life bloom! With all our might...

subtitles.original: もっとバリバリ！
subtitles.english: Go for it even more!

subtitles.original: プリキュア プリキュア プリキュア プリキュア
subtitles.english: Precure! Precure! Precure! Precure!

subtitles.english: Prettily, Cure Cure! We are Precure!

subtitles.original: たまには放課後のほほんと おしゃべり Very time!
subtitles.english: Sometimes we just chill and chat after school. Very time!

subtitles.original: ウワサは恋する乙女の ビタミン剤だもん
subtitles.english: Rumors are like vitamins for girls in love!

subtitles.original: 闇夜に浮かんだ虹のかけ橋
subtitles.english: A rainbow bridge floating in the dark night,

subtitles.original: ここに降りて（ここに降りて）奇跡☆
subtitles.english: Descend right here and create a miracle!

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: Your best! My best! 全力だから
subtitles.english: Your best! My best! Because we're at full power,

subtitles.original: 友情、愛情、サイコー！
subtitles.english: Friendship and love are the best!

subtitles.original: 論より証拠の輝くえくぼ
subtitles.english: Proof over argument is my shining dimple,

subtitles.original: 必殺技で ハートキュン！
subtitles.english: With my special move, heart kyuun!

subtitles.original: 瞳に星映して 思いっきり～
subtitles.english: Reflecting stars in my eyes, with all my might...

subtitles.original: もっとキラキラ！
subtitles.english: Sparkle even more!

subtitles.english: Tomorrow's wind will blow tomorrow,

subtitles.original: マジ意味わかんない

subtitles.original: 今しか出来ない宿題
subtitles.english: The homework that can only be done now...

subtitles.original: 頑張らなくっちゃ！
subtitles.english: I've got to work hard at it!

subtitles.original: 真逆のキャラでもあい通じてる

subtitles.original: (Chu wa)
subtitles.english: (Chu wa)

subtitles.original: ありがとう、かなたん。なんとなくヒーローって何かって掴めた気がするよ。
subtitles.english: Thank you, Kanatan. I feel like I've finally grasped what a hero is.

subtitles.original: 良かった。きっとラミィなら素敵なヒーローになれるよ。
subtitles.english: That's good. I'm sure you'll become a wonderful hero, Lamy.

subtitles.original: 人を思いやる気持ちを忘れずにね。
subtitles.english: Just don't forget to be considerate of others.

subtitles.original: 分かった！ラミィなりのヒーロー像、考えてみるよ。ありがとう！
subtitles.english: I will! I'll think about what kind of hero I want to be. Thanks!

subtitles.original: それじゃ、さらば！！
subtitles.english: Well then, farewell!!

subtitles.original: あ、行っちゃった。
subtitles.english: Ah, she's gone.

subtitles.original: よし！この調子で次に行くぞ！
subtitles.english: Alright! Let's keep this momentum and move on to the next one!
